methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Pre-Seed → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.5x) to $5M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 21 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Galadyne is a Pre-Seed stage company in Defense & Security founded by Chandler Luzsicza, having raised $4.8M to date. The Defense & Security sector contains 10 comparable companies (2 public, 8 private), including peers such as Anduril Industries, Scale AI, Saronic, Flock Safety, and Shield AI.

The valuation analysis relies primarily on stage-progression methodology, which is applicable given Galadyne's early stage. Using the $4.8M total raised as a proxy for current valuation and applying a typical Pre-Seed to next-stage step-up multiplier of 2.5x yields an implied valuation of $12M. Peer-median analysis was not applicable; while 21 same-sector peers exist broadly, the narrow filters (same-stage, adjacent-stage, similar-valuation-tier) returned insufficient datapoints (fewer than 3) to support a reliable median calculation, and a broader all-sector median would lack specificity.

The triangulated analysis, constrained to a single applicable method, supports a valuation range of $10M to $14M, with a median of $12M. Key uncertainties include the limited methodological breadth—reliance on a single step-up multiplier without peer validation—and the absence of recent financials or traction metrics. The wide band between low and high ($10M–$14M) reflects inherent stage uncertainty rather than methodological consensus.
